<!-- Problem or context this change addresses. -->

## Who is this feature for?

<!-- Target user or use case. -->

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123 or Relates to #456 -->

<!-- Optional: call out areas for special attention, design decisions, or follow-up work. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] **Breaking changes?** Yes / No / N/A (if yes, describe in notes or docs)
- [ ] **Documentation updated** (README, docs/, or IaC templates as needed)
- [ ] **Tests added or updated** (`make lambda.test` passes)

## AI Summary

<!-- Summary for AI reviewers. Fill in or let an AI generate this so agents can quickly assess scope and focus review. -->

- **Scope:** <!-- e.g. lambda/webhook, lambda/scaleup, infra/terraform, docs, AGENTS.md -->
- **Type:** <!-- e.g. feat, fix, docs, refactor -->
- **Key files/areas:** <!-- e.g. lambda/internal/github/client.go, infra/terraform/ec2.tf, docs/getting-started-terraform.md -->
